
# Auto-generated by CVXPYgen on June 20, 2026 at 20:26:27
# Content: Root CMake entry point — builds C solver library and pybind11 extension module
# Copyright 2026 Maximilian Schaller and the CVXPYgen contributors
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)

project(cvxpygen)

# C solver code and static library
# Sets cpg_include and cmake_target_link_libs in this scope via PARENT_SCOPE
add_subdirectory(c)

# pybind11 Python extension module
find_package(pybind11 REQUIRED)

pybind11_add_module(cpg_module ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cpp/src/cpg_module.cpp)

target_include_directories(cpg_module PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cpp/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/c
    ${cpg_include}
)

target_link_libraries(cpg_module PRIVATE
    cpg
)

install(TARGETS cpg_module DESTINATION .)
